Ageratum.remedy: Drink water. Eat light food like plain rice and banana. Emergency care required.

Calotropis Gigantea.remedy: Wash mouth and skin immediatly. Drink water/milk. Emergency care required.

Croton Shrub.remedy: Wash the area of contact with soap. Avoid rubbing or scratching. Drink water. Emergency care required.

Datura.remedy: No home remedy. Emergency care required.

Jatropha.remedy: Rinse mouth properly. Do not induce vomiting. Drink water. Emergency care required.

Lantana Camara.remedy: Rinse mouth. Drink water and go to hospital ASAP.

Mimosa Pudica.remedy: Non Toxic but recommended not to eat.

Money Plant.remedy: Rinse mouth properly. Drink cold water or milk. Avoid spicy foods.

Oleander.remedy: Immediate first aid. Rinse mouth properly. Drink water. Emergency care required

Tridax.remedy: Non Toxic but recommended not to eat.
